english_text: Those were the good old days
We were so happy back then
Mom made a lot of food
My mom is the best cook
I grew up in this neighborhood
Dad is watching TV in the living room
Turn off the lights and go to sleep
I have to study for the exam
Let's buy some snacks at the store
The owner is nice to us
My first love was in this alley
I had a crush on you
I'd do anything for my friends
korean_text: 친구를 위해서라면 뭐든 할 수 있어
romanization: chingureul wihaeseoramyeon mwodeun hal su isseo

english_text: Family is the most important thing
Mom and dad work so hard
I want to make my parents proud
I want to go back to those days
Those memories are precious to me
We had nothing but we had everything
Those were the best days of my life
I wouldn't trade those memories for anything
korean_text: 그 추억은 무엇과도 바꿀 수 없어
romanization: geu chueogen mueotkwado bakkul su eopseo

english_text: The alley is still the same
Home is where the heart is
Seeing you all makes me emotional
